info.name: Learnova API
info.description:
Comprehensive API collection for Learnova LMS platform.

## Setup
1. Set environment variables:
   - `base_url` → `http://localhost:4000/api`
   - `video_url` → `http://localhost:4001/api`
   - `token` → (auto-filled after login)
   - `service_token` → (from /videos/token endpoint)

## Auth Flow
Run **POST /auth/login** → the `token` variable is auto-set via the test script.

request.description: Check main server + database connectivity.
Check video service health (database, redis, MinIO storage).
Register a new user. name: min 2 chars, password: min 8 chars.

Login and auto-save token to collection variable.

Uses {{admin_email}} / {{admin_password}} from the active environment.

Local test accounts (set in local env):
- admin@learnova.dev / admin123
- instructor@learnova.dev / inst123
- alice@learnova.dev / alice123
- bob@learnova.dev / bob123
- sarah@learnova.dev / sarah123
Get authenticated user profile.
Stateless logout (client drops token).
Request a password reset OTP via email.
Verify 6-character OTP sent to email.
Reset password using verified OTP. newPassword: min 8 chars.
List all courses for admin/instructor dashboard.
Create a new course. Auto-saves course_id variable.
Get full course detail for editing (admin/instructor view).

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Updated Course Title",
  "description": "Full course description here.",
  "tags": ["javascript", "web"],
  "visibility": "PUBLIC",
  "accessRule": "OPEN",
  "price": null
}

request.description:
Update course metadata.

visibility: PUBLIC | PRIVATE
accessRule: OPEN | SIGNED_IN | ON_PAYMENT
price: number (required if ON_PAYMENT)
Toggle course publish state.
Upload cover image for a course (multipart/form-data, field: file).
Permanently delete a course and all its content.
Generate a shareable enrollment link for the course.
Enroll users by email address (admin bulk enrollment).
Send an email/message to all enrolled attendees.
List all lessons for a course (admin view).

Create a new lesson.

type: VIDEO | DOCUMENT | IMAGE | QUIZ
Get full lesson detail for editing.

Update lesson metadata.

duration: seconds
timestamps: [{time: seconds, label: string}]
Delete a lesson permanently.
Reorder lessons by providing IDs in desired order.
Upload a file attachment to a lesson. Auto-uploads to Cloudinary.
List all attachments for a lesson.
Add an external link as a lesson attachment.
Upload a file as a lesson attachment (multipart).
Delete a specific lesson attachment.
List all quizzes for a course.
Create a new quiz for a course.

Add a question to a quiz.

correctOptions: array of option indices (0-based)
Supports multiple correct answers.
Set decreasing point rewards per attempt number.
Get all learner attempts for analytics.
Get analytics: pass rate, average score, question-level breakdown.
Submit a quiz attempt. Returns score and points earned.
Get the authenticated learner's past attempts for this quiz.
List all published courses. No auth required. If token is provided, includes enrollment status.
Get course overview: lessons, quizzes, instructor info, enrollment status. Auth optional.
Get all courses the authenticated learner is enrolled in, with progress.
Enroll the authenticated user into a course (OPEN or SIGNED_IN access).
Mock payment for ON_PAYMENT courses (dev/test only). Enrolls the user.
Get the learner's progress: completedLessonIds, progressPct, status.
Mark a lesson as completed. Updates enrollment progress percentage.
Get paginated reviews for a course. Public endpoint.
Submit a review for a course. rating: 1-5 (integer).
Update the authenticated user's existing review.
Delete the authenticated user's review.
Get learner profile: totalPoints, currentBadge, enrollmentCount, completedCount.
List all published courses. No auth required.
Get full course data for the learner player (lessons, quizzes, progress).
Get individual lesson content for the player view.
Mark a lesson as completed (updates progress).
Undo lesson completion.
Get high-level reporting stats: total enrollments, completions, avg progress.
Get paginated learner progress table.
Get all courses with enrollment counts for reporting overview cards.
List all users. Filter by role(s) using comma-separated values.
List all available certificate templates. Public endpoint.

Preview a certificate template as HTML. Public endpoint.

Example templateKey: classic-gold
Get all certificates earned by the authenticated user.
Get the authenticated user's certificate for a specific course.
Issue a certificate for a completed course. Course must be 100% complete.
View a certificate as rendered HTML. Public, shareable URL.
Verify certificate authenticity. Returns JSON or HTML based on Accept header.
Get a short-lived JWT to authorize direct browser uploads to the video service. Auto-saves service_token.

formdata.description: Video file (mp4, mov, avi, mkv, webm — max 5GB)

request.description:
Upload a video file directly. Triggers transcoding to HLS (360p–1080p).

Requires service_token from GET /videos/token.
Get a presigned MinIO URL for client-side direct upload. mimeType must be an allowed video MIME type.
Manually trigger transcoding for an already-uploaded video.
Get video metadata: status, streamUrl, thumbnailUrl, duration.
List all videos with pagination and optional status filter.
Delete a video and all its transcoded HLS segments from MinIO.
Fetch the HLS master playlist. Used by HLS.js / video players.
Fetch a specific quality playlist. Available: 360p, 480p, 720p, 1080p.
Fetch the auto-generated video thumbnail.

Called by the video service when processing completes.

events: video.ready | video.failed
Do not call manually in production — this is service-to-service.
